FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Namespace FluentGpu.Layout

Classes

FlexLayout

Flexbox layout over the SoA scene columns. Two descents: Measure (bottom-up — content/basis base sizes, honoring explicit size + min/max + text content) then Arrange (top-down — distribute free space by flex-grow/shrink, position by justify-content, align the cross axis by align-items/align-self incl. stretch, applying margins). Direction 0 = row (main = X), 1 = column (main = Y). Wrap / grid / absolute positioning are the remaining layout work.

LayoutInvalidator

Scoped relayout (layout.md §4): consumes the SceneStore's LayoutDirty worklist and, for each dirty node, walks UP to the nearest layout boundary — a fixed-size, non-flexing, clipped container whose own size cannot change due to a descendant — then re-solves just that subtree (RunSubtree(NodeHandle)). The boundary is the firewall: a setState deep inside a fixed-size card relayouts only the card, never the page. Falls back to a full layout from the root when a dirty node has no bounded ancestor.

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
